steps.stdout:
verification Passed
runtime-jit evidence:
  - flashinfer_tactic_autotune backend=flashinfer bounded_by=artifact:kv_cache_update,region:kv_cache_update,region:prefill_attention,selected_backend:primary:flashinfer,trigger:--enable-flashinfer-autotune,trigger:VLLM_FLASHINFER_AUTOTUNE_CACHE_DIR,trigger:VLLM_HAS_FLASHINFER_CUBIN,warmup:correctness-range:kv_cache_update mitigation=Persist the autotune cache as a first-class artifact and verify replay against the exact cache file.
  - triton_attention_warmup_gap backend=triton bounded_by=selected_backend:secondary:triton,trigger:--cudagraph-capture-sizes,trigger:--max-cudagraph-capture-size,trigger:CompilationConfig,warmup:correctness-range:decode_attention,warmup:correctness-range:prefill_attention,warmup:cuda-graph-b1-s128:decode_attention,warmup:hot-b1-s128:decode_attention,warmup:hot-b1-s128:prefill_attention,warmup:hot-b4-s2048:decode_attention,warmup:hot-b4-s2048:prefill_attention,warmup:performance-range:decode_attention,warmup:performance-range:prefill_attention mitigation=Promote region-scoped warmup obligations into the canonical plan instead of relying on one generic dummy run.
  - guard_dropped_dynamic_shapes backend=torch.compile bounded_by=packaging:PreferPrebuiltThenAot,primary_backend:flashinfer,runtime_jit_policy:Forbidden,trigger:CompilationConfig,warmup:correctness-range:decode_attention,warmup:correctness-range:prefill_attention,warmup:correctness-range:transformer_block_body,warmup:cuda-graph-b1-s128:decode_attention,warmup:hot-b1-s128:decode_attention,warmup:hot-b1-s128:prefill_attention,warmup:hot-b1-s128:transformer_block_body,warmup:hot-b4-s2048:decode_attention,warmup:hot-b4-s2048:prefill_attention,warmup:hot-b4-s2048:transformer_block_body,warmup:performance-range:decode_attention,warmup:performance-range:prefill_attention,warmup:performance-range:transformer_block_body mitigation=Treat guard policy as a guarantee-plane input and require contradiction evidence when evaluate-guards mode is requested.
operator gates:
  - verify compile_free=true forbidden_queues=Compile,Assemble,ArtifactIo,Warmup
  - replay compile_free=true forbidden_queues=Compile,Assemble,ArtifactIo,Warmup
